notes: Primary criminal-law judgments were fetched from HKLII's public API.
Supplemental textbook passages were used to improve topic coverage and backfill missing authorities.
NotebookLM is optional in this build; uncovered topics are surfaced in monitor_report.json for later enrichment.
viewer_heading_public: Hong Kong Criminal Law Hierarchical Knowledge Graph
viewer_heading_internal: Hong Kong Criminal Law Internal Hierarchy Explorer
viewer_intro_public: A criminal-law hierarchy and authority network built from HKLII judgments plus local textbook passages. Start at the doctrinal modules, then drill into topics, cases, and statutes.
viewer_intro_internal: This internal criminal-law explorer uses the same hierarchy shell but keeps the graph centered on case metadata, textbook support passages, and statute links.

authority_tree.label_en: Hong Kong Criminal Law Knowledge Graph
authority_tree.summary_en: Criminal-law authority tree spanning general principles, substantive offences, defences, evidence, procedure, appeals, and sentencing.
authority_tree.summary_zh: 涵蓋總則、實體罪行、抗辯、證據、程序、上訴及量刑的刑法權威樹。

modules.label: General Principles / 刑事責任總則
modules.summary_en: Foundational criminal-law rules governing conduct, fault, causation, participation, and inchoate liability.
modules.summary_zh: 涵蓋行為、罪責、因果關係、共同參與及未完成罪行的基礎規則。
modules.summary: Foundational criminal-law rules governing conduct, fault, causation, participation, and inchoate liability.

subgrounds.label: Actus Reus and Causation / 犯罪行為與因果關係
subgrounds.summary_en: The external elements of offences, omissions, and causal responsibility.
subgrounds.summary_zh: 外部犯罪構成、作為與不作為，以及因果責任。
subgrounds.summary: The external elements of offences, omissions, and causal responsibility.

subgrounds.label: Mens Rea and Fault / 主觀罪責
subgrounds.summary_en: Intent, knowledge, recklessness, dishonesty, and other mental elements.
subgrounds.summary_zh: 故意、明知、魯莽、不誠實等主觀要素。
subgrounds.summary: Intent, knowledge, recklessness, dishonesty, and other mental elements.

subgrounds.label_zh: 共同參與與未完成罪行
subgrounds.label: Participation and Inchoate Liability / 共同參與與未完成罪行
subgrounds.secondary_label: 共同參與與未完成罪行
subgrounds.summary_en: Secondary liability, conspiracy, attempts, and joint enterprise questions.
subgrounds.summary_zh: 從犯責任、串謀、企圖及共同犯罪問題。
subgrounds.summary: Secondary liability, conspiracy, attempts, and joint enterprise questions.

modules.label: Offences Against the Person / 侵害人身罪行
modules.summary_zh: 包括殺人、暴力及性罪行。

subgrounds.label: Homicide / 殺人罪
subgrounds.summary_en: Murder, manslaughter, and homicide-specific doctrines.
subgrounds.summary_zh: 謀殺、誤殺及相關原則。
subgrounds.summary: Murder, manslaughter, and homicide-specific doctrines.

subgrounds.label: Non-fatal Violence / 非致命暴力罪行
subgrounds.summary_en: Assault, wounding, grievous bodily harm, and related offences.
subgrounds.summary_zh: 襲擊、傷人、嚴重身體傷害等。
subgrounds.summary: Assault, wounding, grievous bodily harm, and related offences.

subgrounds.label: Sexual Offences / 性罪行
subgrounds.summary_en: Consent, complainant evidence, and major sexual offences.
subgrounds.summary_zh: 同意、證據評價及主要性罪行。
subgrounds.summary: Consent, complainant evidence, and major sexual offences.

modules.label: Property and Dishonesty Offences / 財產與不誠實罪行
modules.summary_en: Theft, robbery, burglary, fraud, deception, and criminal damage.
modules.summary_zh: 盜竊、搶劫、入屋犯法、詐騙、欺騙及刑事毀壞。
modules.summary: Theft, robbery, burglary, fraud, deception, and criminal damage.

subgrounds.label: Theft and Robbery / 盜竊與搶劫
subgrounds.summary_en: Appropriation, dishonesty, force, and related property offences.
subgrounds.summary_zh: 挪佔、不誠實、武力及相關財產罪行。
subgrounds.summary: Appropriation, dishonesty, force, and related property offences.

subgrounds.label: Burglary and Criminal Damage / 爆竊與刑事毀壞
subgrounds.summary_en: Entry, trespass, intent, and property interference.
subgrounds.summary_zh: 進入、侵入、意圖及財產侵害。
subgrounds.summary: Entry, trespass, intent, and property interference.

subgrounds.label: Fraud and Deception / 詐騙與欺騙
subgrounds.summary_en: Fraud schemes, false representations, and deception-based liability.
subgrounds.summary_zh: 欺詐安排、虛假陳述及欺騙類罪責。
subgrounds.summary: Fraud schemes, false representations, and deception-based liability.

modules.label_en: Dangerous Drugs, Public Order, and Corruption
modules.label_zh: 危險藥物、公共秩序與廉政罪行
modules.label: Dangerous Drugs, Public Order, and Corruption / 危險藥物、公共秩序與廉政罪行
modules.secondary_label: 危險藥物、公共秩序與廉政罪行
modules.summary_en: Drug trafficking, weapons, public order, bribery, and misconduct cases.
modules.summary_zh: 危險藥物、武器、公共秩序、賄賂及公職失當案件。
modules.summary: Drug trafficking, weapons, public order, bribery, and misconduct cases.

subgrounds.label: Dangerous Drugs / 危險藥物
subgrounds.summary_en: Trafficking, possession, and sentencing in dangerous-drugs cases.
subgrounds.summary_zh: 販毒、管有及相關量刑。
subgrounds.summary: Trafficking, possession, and sentencing in dangerous-drugs cases.

subgrounds.label: Public Order and Weapons / 公共秩序與武器
subgrounds.summary_en: Rioting, unlawful assembly, weapons, and protest-related criminal liability.
subgrounds.summary_zh: 暴動、非法集結、武器及示威相關刑責。
subgrounds.summary: Rioting, unlawful assembly, weapons, and protest-related criminal liability.

subgrounds.label: Corruption and Misconduct / 貪污與公職失當
subgrounds.summary_en: Bribery, misconduct in public office, and corruption-linked conspiracies.
subgrounds.summary_zh: 賄賂、公職人員行為失當及相關串謀。
subgrounds.summary: Bribery, misconduct in public office, and corruption-linked conspiracies.
topic_labels: Bribery and Misconduct in Public Office

modules.label: Defences / 抗辯事由
modules.summary_en: Substantive and excuse-based defences across criminal liability.
modules.summary_zh: 涵蓋實質性及免責性抗辯。
modules.summary: Substantive and excuse-based defences across criminal liability.

subgrounds.label: Self-defence / 自衛
subgrounds.summary_en: Reasonable force, defensive action, and proportionality.
subgrounds.summary_zh: 合理武力、防衛行為及相稱性。
subgrounds.summary: Reasonable force, defensive action, and proportionality.

subgrounds.label: Duress and Necessity / 脅迫與必要性
subgrounds.summary_en: Excusatory defences grounded in coercion or emergency.
subgrounds.summary_zh: 基於脅迫或緊急情況的抗辯。
subgrounds.summary: Excusatory defences grounded in coercion or emergency.

subgrounds.label: Mental Condition and Intoxication / 精神狀態與醉酒
subgrounds.summary_en: Insanity, automatism, diminished responsibility, and intoxication.
subgrounds.summary_zh: 精神失常、自動行為、責任能力減低及醉酒。
subgrounds.summary: Insanity, automatism, diminished responsibility, and intoxication.

modules.label: Criminal Evidence and Procedure / 刑事證據與程序
modules.summary_en: Evidence doctrines, investigative powers, fair-trial issues, and procedure.
modules.summary_zh: 證據法、調查權、公平審訊及程序問題。
modules.summary: Evidence doctrines, investigative powers, fair-trial issues, and procedure.

subgrounds.label: Confession and Exclusion / 招認與排除
subgrounds.summary_en: Voluntariness, oppression, and exclusionary doctrines.
subgrounds.summary_zh: 自願性、壓迫及排除規則。
subgrounds.summary: Voluntariness, oppression, and exclusionary doctrines.

subgrounds.label: Identification and Hearsay / 辨認與傳聞
subgrounds.summary_en: Visual identification, hearsay limits, and reliability concerns.
subgrounds.summary_zh: 目擊辨認、傳聞限制及可靠性問題。
subgrounds.summary: Visual identification, hearsay limits, and reliability concerns.

subgrounds.label: Arrest, Search, and Fair Trial / 拘捕、搜查與公平審訊
subgrounds.summary_en: Police powers, disclosure, and procedural fairness in criminal litigation.
subgrounds.summary_zh: 警方權力、披露義務及刑事訴訟中的程序公平。
subgrounds.summary: Police powers, disclosure, and procedural fairness in criminal litigation.

modules.label: Appeals, Sentencing, and Confiscation / 上訴、量刑與沒收
modules.summary_en: Appeal standards, sentencing methodology, and proceeds-related orders.
modules.summary_zh: 上訴標準、量刑方法及收益沒收。
modules.summary: Appeal standards, sentencing methodology, and proceeds-related orders.

subgrounds.label: Conviction Appeals / 定罪上訴
subgrounds.summary_en: Unsafe verdicts, leave standards, and appellate intervention.
subgrounds.summary_zh: 不安全裁決、上訴許可及介入標準。
subgrounds.summary: Unsafe verdicts, leave standards, and appellate intervention.

children.zh: 不安全裁決與上訴審查

subgrounds.label: Sentencing / 量刑
subgrounds.summary_en: Tariffs, totality, guilty pleas, mitigation, and aggravation.
subgrounds.summary_zh: 量刑起點、整體性、認罪扣減、減刑及加刑因素。
subgrounds.summary: Tariffs, totality, guilty pleas, mitigation, and aggravation.

subgrounds.label: Confiscation and Proceeds / 沒收與犯罪得益
subgrounds.summary_en: Drug-trafficking proceeds, confiscation orders, and financial penalties.
subgrounds.summary_zh: 販毒得益、沒收令及財產處分。
subgrounds.summary: Drug-trafficking proceeds, confiscation orders, and financial penalties.
